description_long: This object is a large, rustic, rectangular loaf of bread with a deep, hollowed-out center, resembling a bread bowl or trencher. The crust is thick, uneven, and jagged along the edges, with torn and frayed sections that give it a handmade, artisanal appearance. The interior is rough and porous, with a slightly lighter color than the exterior, suggesting a well-baked, airy crumb. The surface is matte and flour-dusted, with no visible seeds, scoring, or decorative patterns. The bread appears to be made from a simple wheat-based dough, baked to a golden-brown hue with some darker, toasted areas. Its size and shape suggest it could be used to hold or serve food, such as soups or stews, in an urban street food or market setting.
description: A large, rustic, rectangular loaf of bread with a thick, jagged crust and a deep, hollowed center, resembling a bread bowl or trencher. The surface is rough, flour-dusted, and golden-brown.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep, hollowed center and jagged, torn edges of the bread's crust.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the uneven, frayed rim and the rough, porous interior of the bread.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the full rectangular hollow and the thick, rustic crust surrounding it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bread's thick, rugged crust and the depth of the hollowed center.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, jagged, and uneven, with torn and frayed edges and a rough, rustic texture. There is no visible scoring, flour dusting, or decorative patterning.
